agent_trace.raw_tail:
d performance optimization — 40% faster load times
- CSV export encoding bug fix (customer-reported)
- Security patch deployment completed

**Sprint Status:** Phoenix-23 (Day 8 of 14) on track for Feb 28 release target.

**⚠️ Attention Required:** Two blockers flagged — infrastructure scaling for enterprise rollout and 3rd-party integration delays. Engineering requests exec alignment on scope prioritization.

---

## Customer Feedback & Risk Profile

**Support Volume:** 247 tickets (down from 338 yesterday — 27% improvement)

**Critical Issues:**
- API rate limiting errors: 34 tickets (trending up)
- Mobile app crashes on iOS 17.4: 23 tickets
- Billing discrepancies: 19 tickets

**Risk Assessment:** API rate limiting spike correlates with enterprise customer onboarding. Current thresholds may be insufficient for Q1 growth targets.

**Churn Alert:** Enterprise account "TechGlobal" flagged for escalation — renewal discussion stalled over contract terms.

---

## Industry & Regulatory Landscape

**EU AI Act — 14 Days to Enforcement (March 1, 2026):**
- Mandatory disclosure of AI-generated content
- Penalties up to 6% global revenue for violations
- Compliance team confirms readiness; legal review of customer-facing language recommended

**CCPA Amendments:** New data deletion requirements effective July 2026. Product team assessing implementation impact.

**Strategic Opportunity:** Competitors slow to adapt to EU requirements may create market opening for compliant vendors.

---

## Immediate Action Items

| Priority | Action | Owner | Deadline |
|----------|--------|-------|----------|
| 🔴 High | Competitive response to NexusAI pricing | CRO | Feb 18 |
| 🔴 High | Review API rate limiting thresholds | CTO | Feb 17 |
| 🟡 Medium | Confirm EU AI Act compliance documentation | Legal | Feb 20 |
| 🟡 Medium | TechGlobal renewal escalation | VP Sales | Feb 16 |
| 🟢 Low | Monitor NexusAI beta feedback | Product | Ongoing |

---

*Next briefing: February 16, 2026*
</file_content>

tumen_quota.market_mingghan: 审阅market_analysis.txt，提取关键市场指标与趋势，输出市场摘要段落（目标：100-150字）
tumen_quota.competitor_mingghan: 审阅competitor_intelligence.txt，识别竞争威胁与定价压力，输出竞品情报段落（目标：100-150字）
tumen_quota.customer_mingghan: 审阅customer_feedback.txt，分析工单趋势与风险点，输出客户反馈段落（目标：100-150字）
tumen_quota.product_mingghan: 审阅product_updates.txt，汇总产品发布与工程进展，输出产品更新段落（目标：100-150字）
tumen_quota.industry_mingghan: 审阅industry_news.txt，提取监管动态与行业机会，输出行业新闻段落（目标：100-150字）

decomposition_rule.万→千: 每个mingghan分配给1个千户，千户负责单文件深度分析与摘要撰写
decomposition_rule.千→百: 千户将摘要提交给百户，百户负责2-3个摘要的初步整合
decomposition_rule.百→十: 百户提交给十户，十户负责最终段落润色与格式统一
decomposition_rule.十→户: 十户汇总所有段落，由户级执行者撰写执行摘要与行动项表格

acceptance.内容覆盖: 简报包含市场/竞品/客户/产品/行业5个维度
acceptance.格式要求: 含执行摘要+分节+行动项表格

risks.文件内容缺失: 若某研究文件为空或格式异常，该维度摘要标记为[数据缺失]
risks.字数超标: 若整合后超800字，由十户级执行者精简压缩
